chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1684 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.7240/2023 (151 CPC) 3. For hearing of main case 25.04.2024 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner has already filed an application before the Complaint Redressal Committee constituted u/s 31 (Mechanism for Redressal of Grievances) of the Sindh Public Procurement Rules, 2010, for resolving his grievance against the respondents, which is pending. He would be satisfied, if the said committee is directed to decide his application expeditiously in accordance with law, and in future, he will be dealt with in accordance with law by the respondents particularly respondent No.4, to which learned AAG Sindh has no objection. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. However, if any application of the petitioner is pending before the Complaint Redressal Committee, the same shall be decided within a period of fifteen days without fail, and petitioner be treated equally by the respondents, in accordance with law. Petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application, in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
